brief: US launches fresh strikes on Iran and imposes 50% tariffs on Canada, while at least 27 die in a Guyana ferry disaster and Tropical Storm Bertha forms in the Gulf. Research papers explore AI-assisted evaluation, multitasking with computer agents, and LLM code explanations.
news_summary: US strikes on Iran and 50% tariffs on Canada escalate tensions; a Guyana ferry capsizing kills 27; Tropical Storm Bertha forms near the Gulf Coast.
papers_summary: Papers examine rhetorical patterns for AI-assisted information evaluation, designing communication for multitasking with computer agents, and adapting LLM code explanations to diverse problem-solvers.

en.brief: US launches fresh strikes on Iran and imposes 50% tariffs on Canada, while at least 27 die in a Guyana ferry disaster and Tropical Storm Bertha forms in the Gulf. Research papers explore AI-assisted evaluation, multitasking with computer agents, and LLM code explanations.
en.news_summary: US strikes on Iran and 50% tariffs on Canada escalate tensions; a Guyana ferry capsizing kills 27; Tropical Storm Bertha forms near the Gulf Coast.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine rhetorical patterns for AI-assisted information evaluation, designing communication for multitasking with computer agents, and adapting LLM code explanations to diverse problem-solvers.

zh.brief: 阿根廷太阳能列车穿越万年历史，逾三千外籍士兵为俄战死，金门对岸巨型机场引发台湾安全忧虑，贝安德就任英国首相，朝鲜民众透过K-pop接触外界文化。
zh.news_summary: 今日焦点包括阿根廷零排放豪华列车旅游、俄乌战争中来自40多国的外籍战士死亡、厦门翔安机场距离金门仅三公里引发军事担忧、贝安德出任英国首相、西班牙加时胜阿根廷夺世界杯，以及朝鲜年轻人受K-pop影响。

todays_image.caption: The swamp sparrow's scientific name, "Melospiza georgiana georgiana," evokes the Georgia in the Caucasus region, a neighbor to Iran, where US strikes and Houthi threats now echo conflict across the same volatile landscape.
todays_image.title: Melospiza georgiana georgiana
